en.hero-descrip-19: Walking alongside visionary churches, ministries, foundations, and businesses united by the Gospel and a passion for human flourishing.
en.partner-descrip-25: Each partnership represents a shared calling — to see transformed lives, thriving communities, and the Gospel reach every corner of the earth.
en.impact-partner-33: Our partners don't just fund projects — they co-labor with us in the Great Commission, seeing transformed lives and churches planted.
en.impact-descriptnum1-34: of field projects made possible through strategic partnerships
en.impact-revealnum1-38: Partnering with Zoe-Tirzah Missions has been one of the most impactful decisions our church has made. The fruit we are seeing across Africa is truly extraordinary."
en.impact-reveal_description-42: Every partnership directly supports evangelism, discipleship, and lasting community transformation across the continent and beyond.
en.impact-transparency_description-44: Monthly impact reports, financial accountability, and real-time field updates so you always know where your investment is going.
en.impact-prayer_description-46: We build deep, lasting relationships — not just transactions. When you partner with us, you become family in the mission.
en.impact-join_desc-49: Whether you're a church, business, foundation, or individual — your partnership can bring Zoe-Tirzah to thousands who have never heard.
en.footer.desc-54: Zoe Tirzah is a welcoming community of faith dedicated to loving God and loving others. Join us as we explore God's Word, experience His presence, and serve our world.
en.footer.copyright-76: © 2020 Reg. Mission in Ghana & Beyond (1175049) and Scotland (SCO48330).

fr.hero-descrip-19: Marchant aux côtés d’églises visionnaires, de ministères et de fondations unis par l’Évangile.
fr.partner-descrip-25: Chaque partenariat représente un appel partagé à transformer des vies et des communautés.
fr.impact-partner-33: Nos partenaires ne financent pas seulement — ils participent à la mission.
fr.impact-descriptnum1-34: des projets de terrain rendus possibles grâce aux partenariats
fr.impact-revealnum1-38: S’associer avec Zoe-Tirzah a été une décision très impactante pour notre église.
fr.impact-revealnum2-40: Fondé sur la relation, guidé par la mission
fr.impact-reveal_description-42: Chaque partenariat soutient directement l’évangélisation et la transformation communautaire.
fr.impact-transparency_description-44: Rapports mensuels et suivi transparent des projets.
fr.impact-prayer_description-46: Nous construisons des relations profondes et durables.
fr.impact-part-48: Faites partie de quelque chose d’important
fr.impact-join_desc-49: Votre partenariat peut toucher des milliers de vies.
fr.impact-worldwide-52: Plus de 60 organisations partenaires dans le monde

ar.hero-descrip-19: نسير مع كنائس وخدمات ومؤسسات متحدة في الإنجيل.
ar.partner-descrip-25: كل شراكة تمثل دعوة مشتركة لتغيير الحياة والمجتمعات.
ar.impact-partner-33: شركاؤنا يشاركون في الخدمة وليس التمويل فقط.
ar.impact-descriptnum1-34: من مشاريع الميدان تمت عبر الشراكات
ar.impact-revealnum1-38: الشراكة مع زوي تيرزا كانت من أكثر القرارات تأثيرًا.
ar.impact-reveal_description-42: كل شراكة تدعم الكرازة والتلمذة والتحول المجتمعي.
ar.impact-join_desc-49: شراكتك يمكن أن تصل إلى آلاف الأرواح.
ar.impact-worldwide-52: أكثر من 60 منظمة شريكة حول العالم
